description_long: This is a classic teapot with a rounded, bulbous body and a smooth, slightly glossy surface. The teapot features a prominent, gently curved spout extending from one side and a sturdy, arching handle on the opposite side, both seamlessly integrated into the main body. A domed lid with a small, central knob sits atop the teapot, fitting snugly into the opening. The teapot is accompanied by two matching teacups, each with its own handle and saucer, all sharing the same material and color palette. The overall color is a deep, muted reddish-brown, with subtle shading that suggests a ceramic or porcelain construction. There are no visible decorative patterns or embellishments, giving the set a minimalist and functional appearance.
description: A rounded, reddish-brown teapot with a domed lid, curved spout, and arching handle, accompanied by two matching teacups and saucers. The set is smooth, minimalist, and likely ceramic.
description_view_0: The teapot is seen from the side, clearly showing the handle on the left and the spout on the right, with both teacups and saucers visible on either side.
description_view_1: A top-down angle reveals the circular lid and the arrangement of the teacups and saucers, emphasizing the symmetry of the set.
description_view_2: The opposite side view highlights the spout on the left and the handle on the right, with the teacups and saucers flanking the teapot.
description_view_3: A rear view focuses on the back of the teapot, with the handle and spout aligned away from the viewer, and the teacups and saucers positioned to the sides.
attribute_spout_orientation: The spout is straight, slightly angled upward, and positioned on the side of the teapot's main body.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is a thick, smooth arch forming a loop, attached at the upper and lower sides of the teapot, designed for ergonomic gripping.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; domed lid with a central knob, fits snugly.
